info.description: Point-in-time snapshot of a document taken before a sync overwrites it — used for rollback

contentType.comment: Strapi UID of the snapshotted content type

syncDocumentId.comment: documentId of the Strapi document that was snapshotted (renamed — documentId is reserved in v5)

locale.comment: Locale of the snapshotted document, null for non-i18n

snapshotData.comment: Full serialised document at time of snapshot, keyed by locale

mediaManifest.comment: List of media files referenced: [{ id, hash, url, name }]

logId.comment: documentId of the env-sync-log entry that created this snapshot

checksum.comment: SHA-256 of snapshotData for integrity verification
